---
title: "The Rev. Charles James Le Geyt"
---

## The Rev. Charles James Le Geyt

**Dates:** (b.1822ish)

### Description

curate of Hursley 1857-8

### Biography

He replaced the rev. Peter Young as curate of Hursley in 1857, and improved the choir during his few years.  (<i>John Keble’s Parishes</i>,139)

### Letters

- Letter from June 13th 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
